hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: Bleu Des Zil in Grand Baie offers a spacious apartment with two bedrooms and a living room. The property features a terrace and a garden, providing ample space for relaxation.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a fully equipped kitchenette. Additional amenities include a balcony, washing machine, and streaming services.
Convenient Location: Located 67 km from Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam Airport, Bleu Des Zil is a short walk from Grand Baie Public Beach. Nearby attractions include Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam Botanical Garden (14 km) and Sugar Museum (15 km).
Guest Favorites: Guests appreciate the convenient location, beach access, and bathroom comfort.
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 10.0 for a two-person trip.

hotels.description_it:
Bleu Des Zil mette a disposizione un alloggio con giardino, terrazza e bar a Grand Baie e dispone di WiFi gratuito e vista sul giardino. Questa struttura mette a disposizione un balcone e il parcheggio privato gratuito.
Questo appartamento con aria condizionata comprende 2 camere da letto, un soggiorno, una cucina con utensili, frigorifero e bollitore elettrico, e 1 bagno con doccia e set di cortesia. Presso questo appartamento troverete asciugamani e lenzuola tra i servizi offerti.
Spiaggia di Grand Baie Ã¨ a 400 metri da questo appartamento, mentre Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam Botanical Garden si trova a 14 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto Internazionale Sir Seewoosagur Ramgoolam si trova a 67 km di distanza.
Le coppie apprezzano molto la posizione: l'hanno valutata 10,0 per un viaggio a due.

hotels.name: Baystone Boutique Hotel & Spa
hotels.description_fr:
Baystone Boutique Hotel & Spa, is a Beachfront Hotel With Panoramic Views Of The Bay located in the heart of Pointe aux Cannoniers, 2 km from the centre of Grand Baie. It features a spa, a wine bar and a bar restaurant.

The hotel offers 6 Types of Accommodation for Different Travel Styles. Modern, bright and spacious suites offer a terrace and are equipped with a telephone, flat-screen satellite TV, minibar, electric safe, and tea-and-coffee-making facilities.

The B restaurant and Mizu Sushi Tapas Wine Bar offers a wide choice of culinary and new taste experiences; between traditional dishes, mediterranean flavour, sushi, selection of tapas, selection of wine and cocktails highlighting local products.

Les 4Â restaurants Ã  la carte donnant sur la baie proposent une variÃ©tÃ© d'expÃ©riences culinaires dirigÃ©es par le chef exÃ©cutif William Gerard.
hotels.description_en:
Overlooking Grand Baie, the hotel features a pure white sandy beach,  3 tempered pools during winter  and a sports centre. It also has a spa and offers a number of land and water sports to guests.
Designed and draped with fine fabrics, wood and marble finishes, all of the suites at the Royal Palm Beachcomber Luxury have a private balcony or terrace with views of the tropical gardens and the ocean. They include free Wi-Fi, private bathrooms with double basins and separate baths and showers.
4 â€˜Ã  la carteâ€™ restaurants overlooking the bay offer a diversity of culinary experiences led by the Executive Chef William Gerard. There is also a hotel bar; â€˜The Barâ€™, with live music in the evenings.
